title: CRITICAL: Implement mandatory risk management before any trading
description: Real money lost (-70%) due to zero risk controls. No stop-loss, no monitoring, no position management. Must be resolved before any future trades.
suggested_actions: Build Simmer position monitor cron (hourly, soft stop-loss at -20%)
Hard rule: NO trades without stop-loss and position monitoring active
Max position size limit (never >30% of portfolio on one bet)
Portfolio-level circuit breaker: pause all trading if total loss > -15%
